info.name: Amazon Marine Backend API
info.description: Postman collection for Amazon Marine Laravel backend (Auth, roles/permissions, and core API contracts).

item.name: Settings & Sessions
item.description: System/company settings and session management. Settings writes typically require admin/roles.manage/permissions.manage.

item.name: Attendance
item.description: Check-in/check-out and attendance stats. attendance.view or reports.view for all users; otherwise own data only.

item.name: Documents
item.description: Company documents and templates. type: company | template. Upload via form-data with file + name + type.

item.name: Tickets
item.description: Use ticket_type_id and priority_id (see folder description for seeded ID meanings). Show Ticket includes `replies` (chronological, oldest first) each with `user`. Add Ticket Reply: POST `tickets/:ticket_id/replies` with JSON `{ "body": "..." }` (requires permission to update the ticket).

body.raw:
